app.title: ShelterBridge
app.tagline: Import a Vault*.sav file to inspect it. Your original file is never modified.

guide.title: Transfer to your iPhone (Finder)
steps: Connect your iPhone to this Mac with a cable.
Unlock the iPhone and tap "Trust This Computer" if asked.
Fully close Fallout Shelter on the iPhone.
Open Finder and select your iPhone in the sidebar.
Select Fallout Shelter in the app list.
Drag the prepared VaultX.sav into the app's documents.
Launch Fallout Shelter on the iPhone and check the slot.

system.decoded: > Vault data decoded — original file untouched.

transfer.tagline: Choose a target slot. ShelterBridge creates a safe copy — your original is never touched.
transfer.done: Prepared {{slot}} — a safe copy; your original is untouched.
